fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the title of the resource located in the service zone.

fields.name: Service Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service zone where the resource will be located. A resource can be located in more than one zone at a time.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date when the resource is located in the service zone.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the resource's assignment to the service zone.
